title: DelayWithProgressNodeConfig
description: Config for core.openwop.examples.delay-with-progress. Sleeps for delayMs and streams a progress event every tickMs.

delayMs.description: Total delay in milliseconds. Bounded to 60s so the node can't be used to stall a run indefinitely.

tickMs.description: How frequently to emit node.progress events while delaying. Defaults to 100ms.
